## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, address issues, and discuss 2026 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance is positive:** Sessions and conversions are growing, with "Tutorials" showing the highest recent jump.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Key issues are resolving:** The comparison page table fix is in QA (prod ETA: Nov 12–13), and the publishing workflow test is set for Nov 13.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [**2026 strategy is forming:** Discussions began on repurposing the `/faq` page for LLMs and indexing Discord knowledge via Reddit, not the Strapi forum.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [**Blockers persist:** Progress is stalled by manual workarounds (e.g., FAQ updates) due to engineering backlog and a lack of self-serve platform access.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Issues

  - [**Article Delivery:** 9 articles delivered last week (2 had code formatting issues). 7 more are scheduled for this week.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Comparison Page Table:** Fix is in QA → prod ETA: Nov 12–13.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [**Publishing Workflow:** A test is scheduled for Nov 13 to resolve minor automation bugs.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**Comparison Page Videos:** Paul is finishing a new "getting started" video (ETA: Nov 12–13) to update all pages.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [**FAQ Component Rollout:**](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Manual updates are required due to engineering backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Progress:** Integration pages are being updated.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Audit of capabilities/features pages completes Nov 14 → updates follow by end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

### Performance Review

  - [**Overall Trends:** Sessions and conversions are growing week-over-week.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Cohort Performance:** "Tutorials" showed the highest jump. "Ecosystem" and "Headless CMS" remain top performers.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [**Negative Mentions (Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX is manually compiling URLs for top 5 negative queries.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [**ETA:** Nov 14 EOD or Nov 17.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The list will inform content strategy and provide community feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)

### 2026 Strategic Planning

  - [**`/faq` Page Repurposing:**](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
      - [**Problem:** The page is outdated but still gets traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Repurpose as an "about page for LLMs" with plain text for better scannability.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [**Integration Page Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [**Action:** Analyze traffic for existing pages to guide future investment.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Create new pages for tools like Cursor, V0, and other AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [**Strapi Forum vs. Discord:**](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
      - [**Problem:** Valuable knowledge is trapped in Discord and not indexed by search.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**Decision:** The Strapi forum will not be revived due to past spam/moderation issues.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
      - [**Proposed Solution:** Automate posting key Discord topics to the Strapi Reddit channel for better search indexability.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [**Self-Serve Platform Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
      - [**Need:** Strapi requires self-serve access to the GrowthX platform (e.g., "Atlas") to run autonomous workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
      - [**Status:** No ETA.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Fix the remaining code formatting issue in one article.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Deliver URLs for the top 5 negative queries by Nov 14 EOD or Nov 17.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [Confirm the FAQ component rollout ETA for capabilities/features pages.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
      - [Investigate self-serve platform access timeline and forum/Discord strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [**Strapi:**](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [Finish the new "getting started" video and update all comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Test the publishing workflow on Nov 13.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [Write the "Migrate from WordPress with Cursor" article.](https://fathom.video/share/rz8w12_gXE-N5T8B3mUAzBNc5sdkr7oK?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
